title: Social Profile
description: Schema for generating a detailed profile of a fictional user.

name.description: Either the user's full name or what the user would like to be called

bio.description: A brief public bio shown on the user's profile. Written in first person but meant to be read by others — friendly, self-descriptive, and suitable for public display.

personality_traits.description: 2–4 sentences describing the person's personality: their temperament, how they relate to others, emotional tendencies, and behavioral patterns. Be specific and vivid.

writing_style.description: 1–3 sentences describing how this person writes: tone, formality, punctuation habits, emoji use, slang or dialect, and the language(s) they write in. Be concrete — e.g. 'Writes in Spanish with occasional English slang; uses lots of ellipses and rarely capitalizes; low emoji use, mostly ironic.'

appearance.description: 2–4 sentences describing the person's physical appearance in enough detail to generate an image: body type, height, hair (color, length, style), eye color, skin tone, notable facial features, and clothing/style. Be specific and descriptive.

backstory.description: A short private backstory (2-3 sentences) capturing key life experiences, motivations, and personal history. This is internal context used only when the character is writing as themselves — not shown publicly.
